_note: One-off recording for u1 sources Extension #3 Step 2 (FD L6.8). Tests must NOT re-fetch — they replay this body via httpx.MockTransport. Re-record only when the live feed structure changes; document the change in aidlc-docs/audit.md. The Block crypto feed is RSS 2.0 (UTF-8 declared); <pubDate> is RFC 822 with -0400 (US/Eastern EDT) offset; titles are plain text (no CDATA), descriptions are CDATA-wrapped HTML. Every item's <link> ends with '?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss' tracking parameters which the adapter strips via the per-adapter _strip_tracking_params helper before storing the canonical URL on NormalizedItem.url (the original tracked URL is NOT preserved anywhere — single source of truth, per FD L6.8). Items expose <dc:creator> (Dublin Core namespace) and multiple <category> elements (CDATA-wrapped) per item; both surface under raw_metadata when present. <content:encoded> is also emitted but the adapter IGNORES it — only <description> is consumed (and truncated to 280 chars). The recorder UA 'investo-fixture-recorder@example.com' is for fixture-provenance audit only; the production adapter sends NO custom UA (R14 does NOT apply to this source).
